message:
fix(vdbe): evaluate wrapper expressions in scalar aggregate subqueries

Correlated scalar subqueries like `(SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM t WHERE ...)`
were returning the raw aggregate result, ignoring the wrapper arithmetic.
The simple-wrapper path in emit_scalar_aggregate_subquery just copied
accum_reg to the output register without evaluating the wrapper expression.

Added emit_simple_agg_wrapper() that creates a fake ScanCtx mapping
__agg_result__ to the accumulator register, then evaluates the wrapper
expression (e.g. __agg_result__ - 1) through emit_expr.

Also added compound SELECT/CTE conformance oracle tests.

Tests: core 1580 (+3), VDBE 476, all passing, clippy+fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
